Refugee chords for acoustic guitar
Tom Petty and The Heartbreakers  1980

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Refugee_(Tom_Petty_and_the_Heartbreakers_song)

Capo II *

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  4x

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

Ain't no real big secret, all the same, somehow we get around it[/tab]

You believe what you want to believe, you see
